name: Craftable Restaurant Beverage Management API
what_it_does: Craftable Restaurant Beverage Management REST API for bar and restaurant alcohol inventory, recipe costing, and purchasing management. Enables AI agents to manage alcohol and beverage inventory tracking for bar operations optimization, handle cocktail recipe costing and beverage cost management for bar profitability, access purchase order and vendor management for beverage procurement automation, retrieve variance analysis and pour cost tracking for beverage cost control, manage bar waste and spillage tracking for inventory accuracy, handle alcohol supplier ordering and invoice reconciliation for beverage purchasing compliance, access liquor license and purchase reporting for alcohol compliance, retrieve multi-location bar inventory for restaurant group beverage management, manage recipe standardization and menu engineering for beverage profitability, and integrate Craftable with POS systems (Toast, Lightspeed) and accounting platforms.
use_cases: Tracking bar inventory from beverage management agents
Managing cocktail recipe costs from bar profitability agents
Automating alcohol purchasing from procurement agents
Controlling pour variance from beverage operations agents
not_for: Non-alcoholic food-only restaurants without beverage program
Retail liquor stores without bar/restaurant context
Organizations using Restaurant365 for beverage management
best_when: A bar, restaurant, or hotel beverage program using Craftable wants AI agents to automate alcohol inventory tracking, cocktail costing, supplier ordering, and beverage cost variance management.
avoid_when: LIQUOR LICENSE COMPLIANCE RISK: Craftable manages alcohol inventory and purchasing — automated alcohol purchasing must comply with state alcohol beverage control (ABC) laws on licensed supplier purchasing, quantity limits, and record-keeping; non-compliant automated purchasing creates state liquor license risk. Dram shop liability — automated bar inventory management must help identify over-service situations; missing or inaccurate inventory records create evidentiary challenges in dram shop liability claims. TTB reporting — on-premise licensees with significant alcohol volume may have TTB (Tax and Trade Bureau) reporting obligations; automated inventory records must support TTB compliance documentation.

auth.notes: Craftable uses API key authentication. REST API with JSON. San Francisco, California HQ. Founded 2014. Private (Bessemer Venture Partners, True Ventures). 2,500+ bar and restaurant customers. Beverage management specialist. Deep POS integration (Toast, Lightspeed). Competes with BevSpot, Barkeep, and MarketMan for beverage management.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — monthly per-location subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Monthly per-location subscription; enterprise pricing for groups
pricing.notes: San Francisco, CA. Founded 2014. Bessemer/True Ventures-backed. 2,500+ customers. Beverage management specialist. Deep Toast POS integration. Competes with BevSpot and MarketMan.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented per integration

known_agent_gotchas: STATE ABC LAW COMPLIANCE: Automated alcohol purchasing must comply with state ABC laws on licensed supplier purchasing requirements, quantity limits, and purchase record keeping; automated purchasing from unlicensed suppliers creates state liquor license violation risk

Dram shop liability records — accurate automated bar inventory records provide evidentiary foundation for dram shop liability defense; inaccurate records create evidentiary challenges in over-service liability claims
TTB federal reporting — large on-premise alcohol licensees may have TTB reporting obligations for beverage alcohol operations; automated inventory records must support TTB compliance documentation
POS depletion accuracy — automated Craftable inventory depletion from POS sales requires accurate menu item-to-recipe mapping; unmapped or incorrectly mapped items create pour cost calculation errors
No webhooks — inventory count and purchase event notification requires polling; no native push for inventory events, purchase approvals, or variance alerts

Supplier pricing volatility — automated beverage purchase orders without price change validation create cost overrun risk in volatile spirits and wine markets; implement price change approval thresholds
agent_readiness.security_notes: Beverage management. SOC2. API key auth. US. Alcohol inventory and purchasing data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Beverage management. SOC2. API key. US. Alcohol inventory and purchasing data.
